scripts.lint: eslint src main.mjs preload.cjs electron scripts --max-warnings=0
scripts.validate:electron-bridge: node --check main.mjs && node --check preload.cjs && node --check electron/main.mjs && node --check electron/preload.cjs
scripts.validate:desktop: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run prepare:release-bundle && npm run release:stage-desktop && npm run validate:electron-bridge && npm run validate:desktop-integration && npm run validate:packaged-desktop-smoke
scripts.build:electron: vite build && npm run prepare:release-bundle && npm run release:stage-desktop && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --dir -c.directories.app=release/staged-app
scripts.dist:win: vite build && npm run prepare:release-bundle && npm run release:stage-desktop && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs -w --x64 -c.directories.app=release/staged-app
